[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 101001000 3
2 000110000 2
3 001000000 1
4 001000000 1
5 000101011 4
6 001111000 4
7 001000100 2
